Here's what I found about the **Plage de Saint-Jorioz** from the loisirs74.fr website:

## Overview
The Plage de Saint-Jorioz is the only large natural sandy beach on Lake Annecy. Located on the western shore of the lake, facing the Dents de Lanfon and the Tournette, it stretches over about 2,200 m² and combines a fine sandy beach (about 100 meters long) with expansive shaded lawns.

## Opening Hours & Access
The beach is open year-round. Free access from January 1 to June 30 and from September 1 to December 31. Paid access with lifeguards from July 1 to August 31, from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM. Closed from 7:00 to 9:30 AM for cleaning in July–August.

## Prices (2026)
Adult (18 and older): €2.60 · Child 10–17 years: €1 · Under 10: free · Entry after 4:30 PM: €1 · Season ticket (unlimited July–August access): €22 · Chip card support (processing fee): €2. Off-season (Sept.–June): free.

Regarding tickets: Online ticketing is available at saint-jorioz.fr (E-Shop): purchase of a chip card, a 10 or 20 pack, or a single ticket (QR code by email).

## Environmental & Accessibility Labels
Awarded the Blue Flag label since 2010, the beach guarantees high environmental standards: daily cleaning during the season, sand renewal every four years, waste management, and public awareness.

It has also received the "Tourism and Disability" label thanks to special facilities: water access and free provision of two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo and Hippocampe) in July–August.

## Practical Information
- **Dogs:** Dogs are prohibited year-round at the Plage de Saint-Jorioz, even on a leash, in accordance with the Blue Flag label.
- **Parking:** The beach has a large free shaded parking lot in front of the entrance. In summer it is often full: arrive before 11:00 AM or use the overflow parking (marina, sports complex).

*Note: This information was confirmed on the official website as of May 14, 2026, subject to seasonal changes. For the most current details, you can visit the loisirs74.fr page directly.*

content.text: Let me fetch the detail page directly to confirm the three specific facts.

input.prompt: Extract exactly three facts: (1) entry price / tarif, (2) opening hours / horaires, (3) wheelchair accessibility / accessibilité PMR fauteuil roulant. Quote the figures and details precisely.

content.content:
# Three Key Facts: Plage de Saint-Jorioz

**(1) Entry Price / Tarif:**
"Adulte (18 ans et +) : 2,60 € · Enfant 10–17 ans : 1 € · Moins de 10 ans : gratuit"
The beach is free from September through June.

**(2) Opening Hours / Horaires:**
"Accès libre et gratuit du 1er janvier au 30 juin et du 1er septembre au 31 décembre. Accès payant et surveillance MNS du 1er juillet au 31 août de 9h30 à 17h30."
Daily cleaning occurs from 7–9:30 AM during summer.

**(3) Wheelchair Accessibility / Accessibilité:**
"Rampe d'accès à l'eau, tapis avec main courante et deux fauteuils amphibies (tiralo + hippocampe) gratuits en juillet-août"
The beach holds the "Tourisme et Handicap" label and offers level entry, adapted restrooms, and reserved parking.

content.text:
Here are the three requested facts for **Plage de Saint-Jorioz**, from [loisirs74.fr](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz):

- **Entry price:** Adult (18+) €2.60 · Child 10–17 €1 · Under 10 free. Access is free off-season (September–June); paid only in July–August.
- **Opening hours:** Free open access 1 Jan–30 Jun and 1 Sep–31 Dec. Paid access with lifeguards (MNS) 1 Jul–31 Aug, 9:30 AM–5:30 PM (closed 7:00–9:30 AM for cleaning in summer).
- **Wheelchair accessibility:** "Tourisme et Handicap" label — water-access ramp, matting with handrail, adapted restrooms, reserved parking, plus two amphibious wheelchairs (Tiralo + Hippocampe) provided free in July–August.

I only browsed and read the pages; no forms were submitted or bookings made.

Sources:
- [Plage de Saint-Jorioz — Loisirs 74](https://loisirs74.fr/plage-de-saint-jorioz)
